history.reason: spec/design/idef0/grafcet/c4/sequence/data-schema all drafted; cursor protocol pivoted per user direction (DD-1)

Paradigm shift: harness-managed compaction → AI-managed context with hybrid-llm formula context(n) = journal(n) + LLM_compact(context(n-1)). New total scope subsumes original tool-output-chunking, narrative-decay fix, mid-work continuity protection, AI self-management primitives, and 4-layer defense against AI forgetfulness. State-machine does not allow refactor from designed (only from living), so equivalent operation performed manually: artifacts moved to .history/refactor-2026-04-29/, state reset to proposed, proposal.md preserved (will be substantially revised). Path B chosen over splitting into two specs because the four problems (type-2 single-tool overflow, narrative cross-generation decay, mid-multi-step-work loss, AI self-management) all share root cause: bounded context as resource.
tasks.md (5 phases, 56 slices) + handoff.md + errors.md + observability.md drafted; ready for build
